top_issues: Connector keep-out assumption is tight for line-side assembly and inspection
recommended_actions: Lock critical dimensions into the launch control plan and reaction plan.
Define operator / lot / revision linkage at the first in-line quality capture point.
Use the traceability scheme as a production-stabilization aid, not only as a reporting artifact.
summary.heuristics_notice: Quality-risk pack is a rule-based readiness aid and should be validated against plant quality systems.

traceability_summary.retention_note: Keep launch trace records for domestic and overseas stabilization.
traceability_summary.label_strategy: tray label with program, rev, lot

quality_risks.title: No fillet or chamfer operations found — internal corners may cause stress concentration
quality_risks.recommendation: Add fillet (R >= 0.5mm) or chamfer to internal corners

quality_risks.title: Connector keep-out assumption is tight for line-side assembly and inspection
quality_risks.recommendation: Reserve additional probe and hand-tool clearance or define dedicated access tooling.

quality_gates.name: Incoming blank verification
quality_gates.objective: Check thickness, alloy, and coating condition.

quality_gates.name: Bend and hole pattern verification
quality_gates.objective: Control bend angle and mounting pattern before downstream assembly.
